languages.text: Как только капитан отряда касается мужчины, тот дергает головой и с тощнотворным треском разрываемой кожи отрывает губы от трубки. Мостик наполняется истошным визгом безумца, который спустя считанные минуты испускает дух, колотясь в судорогах и изрыгая черную пену.

traits.locale_text: Как только капитан отряда касается мужчины, тот дергает головой и с тощнотворным треском разрываемой кожи отрывает губы от трубки. Мостик наполняется истошным визгом безумца, который спустя считанные минуты испускает дух, колотясь в судорогах и изрыгая черную пену.

languages.text: As soon as the squad captain touches the man, he jerks back his head, ripping his lips from the tube with a sickening snap of skin. The bridge fills with the madman's bloodcurdling howls, but within minutes he breathes his last, convulsing and spewing black foam.
languages.original_text: Как только капитан отряда касается мужчины, тот дергает головой и с тощнотворным треском разрываемой кожи отрывает губы от трубки. Мостик наполняется истошным визгом безумца, который спустя считанные минуты испускает дух, колотясь в судорогах и изрыгая черную пену.

traits.locale_text: As soon as the squad captain touches the man, he jerks back his head, ripping his lips from the tube with a sickening snap of skin. The bridge fills with the madman's bloodcurdling howls, but within minutes he breathes his last, convulsing and spewing black foam.

As soon as the squad captain touches the man, he jerks back his head, ripping his lips from the tube with a sickening snap of skin. The bridge fills with the madman's bloodcurdling howls, but within minutes he breathes his last, convulsing and spewing black foam.

As soon as the squad captain touches the man, he jerks back his head, ripping his lips from the tube with a sickening snap of skin. The bridge fills with the madman's bloodcurdling howls, but within minutes he breathes his last, convulsing and spewing black foam.

languages.text: 就在小队队长碰到那男人的一瞬间，他猛地向后一仰，伴随着令人作呕的皮肉撕裂声，他的嘴唇从导管上撕裂了下来。舰桥上顿时充斥着那疯子令人毛骨悚然的嚎叫，但没过几分钟，他便抽搐着吐出黑色泡沫，咽下了最后一口气。
languages.original_text: As soon as the squad captain touches the man, he jerks back his head, ripping his lips from the tube with a sickening snap of skin. The bridge fills with the madman's bloodcurdling howls, but within minutes he breathes his last, convulsing and spewing black foam.

traits.locale_text: 就在小队队长碰到那男人的一瞬间，他猛地向后一仰，伴随着令人作呕的皮肉撕裂声，他的嘴唇从导管上撕裂了下来。舰桥上顿时充斥着那疯子令人毛骨悚然的嚎叫，但没过几分钟，他便抽搐着吐出黑色泡沫，咽下了最后一口气。

languages.text: En cuanto el capitán del equipo toca al hombre, reacciona echando la cabeza atrás con todas sus fuerzas, arrancando sus labios del tubo con un nauseabundo chasquido de piel rota. Los aullidos escalofriantes del loco resuenan en el puente, pero en unos minutos deja de respirar, entre estertores y escupiendo espuma negra.
languages.original_text: As soon as the squad captain touches the man, he jerks back his head, ripping his lips from the tube with a sickening snap of skin. The bridge fills with the madman's bloodcurdling howls, but within minutes he breathes his last, convulsing and spewing black foam.

traits.locale_text: En cuanto el capitán del equipo toca al hombre, reacciona echando la cabeza atrás con todas sus fuerzas, arrancando sus labios del tubo con un nauseabundo chasquido de piel rota. Los aullidos escalofriantes del loco resuenan en el puente, pero en unos minutos deja de respirar, entre estertores y escupiendo espuma negra.

languages.text: Dès l'instant où le capitaine d'escouade touche l'homme, ce dernier rejette la tête en arrière, ses lèvres s'arrachant du tube dans un bruit répugnant de chair déchirée. Les hurlements à glacer le sang du pauvre hère emplissent le pont, mais quelques minutes plus tard, il est pris de convulsions, vomit une écume noire et rend son dernier soupir.
languages.original_text: As soon as the squad captain touches the man, he jerks back his head, ripping his lips from the tube with a sickening snap of skin. The bridge fills with the madman's bloodcurdling howls, but within minutes he breathes his last, convulsing and spewing black foam.

traits.locale_text: Dès l'instant où le capitaine d'escouade touche l'homme, ce dernier rejette la tête en arrière, ses lèvres s'arrachant du tube dans un bruit répugnant de chair déchirée. Les hurlements à glacer le sang du pauvre hère emplissent le pont, mais quelques minutes plus tard, il est pris de convulsions, vomit une écume noire et rend son dernier soupir.

languages.text: Yüzbaşı adama dokunur dokunmaz adam, başını geriye doğru atıyor ve mide bulandırıcı bir sesle dudaklarını tüpten koparıyor. Köprü, delinin kan donduran ulumalarıyla doluyor. Adam, birkaç dakika boyunca kasılıp siyah köpükler kusarak son nefesini veriyor.
languages.original_text: As soon as the squad captain touches the man, he jerks back his head, ripping his lips from the tube with a sickening snap of skin. The bridge fills with the madman's bloodcurdling howls, but within minutes he breathes his last, convulsing and spewing black foam.

traits.locale_text: Yüzbaşı adama dokunur dokunmaz adam, başını geriye doğru atıyor ve mide bulandırıcı bir sesle dudaklarını tüpten koparıyor. Köprü, delinin kan donduran ulumalarıyla doluyor. Adam, birkaç dakika boyunca kasılıp siyah köpükler kusarak son nefesini veriyor.

languages.text: Als der Captain des Trupps den Mann berührt, fällt sein Kopf in den Nacken und die Röhre löst sich mit einem widerlichen Schmatzen von seinen Lippen. Die Brücke wird vom schaurigen Heulen des Wahnsinnigen erfüllt, der wenige Minuten später ein letztes Mal schwarzen Schaum ausatmet.
languages.original_text: As soon as the squad captain touches the man, he jerks back his head, ripping his lips from the tube with a sickening snap of skin. The bridge fills with the madman's bloodcurdling howls, but within minutes he breathes his last, convulsing and spewing black foam.

traits.locale_text: Als der Captain des Trupps den Mann berührt, fällt sein Kopf in den Nacken und die Röhre löst sich mit einem widerlichen Schmatzen von seinen Lippen. Die Brücke wird vom schaurigen Heulen des Wahnsinnigen erfüllt, der wenige Minuten später ein letztes Mal schwarzen Schaum ausatmet.

languages.text: 隊長が男に触れた瞬間、男は首を激しく引いて、チューブから唇を剥がした。皮の裂けるような音が響く。橋は男の血気盛んな叫び声で満たされるが、数分後、男は痙攣しながら黒い泡を吐き、息絶えた。
languages.original_text: As soon as the squad captain touches the man, he jerks back his head, ripping his lips from the tube with a sickening snap of skin. The bridge fills with the madman's bloodcurdling howls, but within minutes he breathes his last, convulsing and spewing black foam.

traits.locale_text: 隊長が男に触れた瞬間、男は首を激しく引いて、チューブから唇を剥がした。皮の裂けるような音が響く。橋は男の血気盛んな叫び声で満たされるが、数分後、男は痙攣しながら黒い泡を吐き、息絶えた。
